title: YTP: The Slightly Miffed but Properly Chuffed Gamer (Irate Gamer YTP Collab Entry)
description:
In this video, we see the wild Irate Gamma as it attempts to mate with a curious Super Mario Bros 2 cartridge.

This was part of Duck@zz's Irate Gamer Collab, which you can find here! https://youtu.be/0b1CSJMaBJg?si=qwsPyGsOi-68ffL5 It's got my man guysafari in it too!
